purpose: Defines the reusable plan, execution, acceptance, and stage-closeout contract for curation expansion rounds. This is not approval, release inventory, or runtime installation evidence.

verificationSurface: round registry has goal, allowedChanges, blockedChanges, and exitCriteria
blocked actions preserve non-approval and non-runtime boundaries
next gate is explicit when the round cannot close yet
exitEvidence: human-readable plan context is linked from docs/

requiredInputs: review focus and domain coverage hints
blocked actions inherited from the plan
verificationSurface: source revisions are pinned as full SHAs
license, security, portability, and overlap review surfaces are named
candidate content is not executable release inventory
exitEvidence: execution record references the active round
validation identifies the next acceptance gate

blockedActions: runtime sync without a consumer-side gate
approved payload change without admission evidence
source text redistribution without license clearance
verificationSurface: approval boundary is separate from discovery and intake
release inventory changes, when allowed, pass repository validation
exitEvidence: acceptance record cites evidence and validation
residual risks or deferred items are recorded

requiredInputs: accepted, rejected, deferred, or blocked candidate decisions
blockedActions: claiming global completion from local evidence
local Codex/agents/cc-switch sync before release stability
new candidate intake without a new round gate
verificationSurface: dirty state, skipped checks, deferred work, and authority boundaries are visible
next round or pause decision is explicit
exitEvidence: stage closeout status is reflected in registry/curation-expansion-rounds.json
stage closeout evidence is linked from docs/ when the round closes

deferredActions: activating Round 03 discovery before owner-reviewed rebaseline acceptance
executing, installing, or connecting an external candidate
Skill admission, runtime mutation, cross-repository delivery, or global completion claims
nextRequiredEvidence: owner-reviewed Round 03 capability-survey rebaseline decision event
